arxiv_papers.title: VisiFold: Long-Term Traffic Forecasting via Temporal Folding Graph and Node Visibility
arxiv_papers.snippet: Traffic forecasting is a cornerstone of intelligent transportation systems. While existing research has made significant progress in short-term prediction, long-term forecasting remains a largely uncharted and challenging frontier. arxiv_papers.snippet: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) systems have shown strong potential for language-driven robotic manipulation. However, scaling them to long-horizon tasks remains challenging.
